results.title: Solidroad: The AI-first training and assessment platform | Product Hunt
results.content:
Launched on September 19th, 2024

Solidroad

SolidroadAI-powered role-play training for sales teams

Launched on September 13th, 2023

4.9

Based on 9 reviews

Review Solidroad?

Solidroad is highly praised for its AI-driven training and assessment capabilities, particularly in enhancing communication and sales skills. Users appreciate its ability to provide immediate, personalized feedback and streamline coaching processes. The platform is noted for saving time and resources while delivering high-quality results. The Solidroad team is commended for their professionalism, responsiveness, and client-first approach, making them a valuable partner in training initiatives. Overall, Solidroad is seen as a promising tool for organizations aiming to elevate their training programs.

+6 [...] reduces human resources(2)

saves time(2)

•1 review

Solidroad has strong potential to significantly enhance communication training. While we explored the tool, we were impressed by its AI-powered role-play feature that delivers immediate and personalized feedback, making it an efficient option for streamlining coaching. The product team was a standout in our experience—consistently responsive, professional, and open to feedback. They maintained transparency throughout, providing clear timelines and making every meeting efficient and focused. For organizations seeking an innovative solution to elevate their training programs, Solidroad is a promising tool supported by a team that's truly invested in their product and clients.

results.title: PawChamp Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Veronika Miroshnikova

#### What's great

Great app overall - my dog loves the training sessions and I’ve seen progress.

#### What needs improvement

Docking one star because I wish there were more lessons unlocked in the free version.

Аліна Каменна

#### What's great

The ability to connect with real dog experts through the app is what sold me. Having credible, practical advice alongside the AI assistant makes PawChamp stand out compared to other training apps. It feels trustworthy and complete.

#### What needs improvement

- [...] #### vs Alternatives

Cause of high-level of the product itself, they also don't look scammy.

Tetiana Kovalenko

#### What's great

We brought home a very stubborn beagle, and training him felt impossible. Then I found PawChamp. The onboarding asked smart questions about his age and behavior, and the app built a plan that actually made sense. Every day we did short lessons, and I swear I started seeing progress by week one. Now he sits, stays, and even comes when called - something I thought would never happen. I recommend this app to every new dog parent I meet.

Alina Karandak

#### What's great

I’ve tried a few training apps, and PawChamp is definitely the best so far. My only gripe is where are the reminders and in-app messaging? A little more re-engagement would make it perfect. [...] ### Trending products

### Top forum threads

Daizy Kellow

#### What's great

I’ve been a dog mom for 7 years, and honestly, I thought I had everything figured out. Then we adopted a high-energy doggo who turned our world upside down. Nothing worked - not the books, not the classes. PawChamp was a last try, and it blew me away. The app felt tailored to my dog’s needs, and the daily lessons were easy to integrate into our schedule. Within a month, she was calmer, listening better, and our household felt peaceful again. What I didn’t expect was how much closer we’d become through the process. PawChamp isn’t just about commands - it’s about connection. For me, that’s priceless.

#### What needs improvement

Wait until Pawchie can speak to my dog, maybe they could become friends

results.title: GoIT LMS Reviews (2026) - Product Hunt
results.content: I've been using this platform and, having tried learning on different platforms, I can say that I have something to compare it to. There are key features that affect my productivity, and this LMS fully meets them: 1. It has a visually pleasing design. It's just nice to be on it, navigate through sections, etc. 2. The structure of the materials is totally logical. Everything I need is in one place - I don't need to look for something outside of the LMS, everything is inside: notes, videos, exercises. 3. It's very convenient that the LMS helps organize the learning process, it has a convenient calendar, a dashboard that tracks progress and allows me to see how well I'm following my plan and whether I'm spending enough time. 4. I like the system of achievements and rewards, as well as the [...] like the system of achievements and rewards, as well as the format of duels. It makes learning more interesting and adds excitement. Overall, it's an excellent product, and I use it with pleasure. I recommend it to everyone. [...] The platform looks and sounds impressive, with features likely to enhance the learning experience. Here are my thoughts on the features you highlighted: All-in-one Learning Environment: This is an excellent feature as it streamlines the learning process and makes it easier for students to access all the resources they need in one place. Personalized Progress Tracking: This function is very important as it allows students to constantly monitor their progress and improve their knowledge or develop their strengths. The "Duels" game sounds like an exciting and innovative way to help students improve their coding skills while having fun. It can help to create a competitive atmosphere and foster a sense of community among students. Your LMS seems to offer a comprehensive and engaging learning

Oliv: The Next-Gen AI Sales Assistant

Promoted

## Top reviewed sales training products [...] Dmitry Zakharov
Naoma AI Demo Agent

Naoma AI Demo Agent

Most SaaS companies make interested buyers wait days for a demo slot. By the time the call happens, half the momentum is gone.

We built @Naoma an AI video agent that runs a live, personalized product demo instantly, right on your website. No scheduling. No waiting room. No "let me loop in a sales engineer."

It walks through your product in a real browser session, answers questions on the spot, qualifies the lead, and routes them to CRM, a booked call, or checkout depending on where they are in the funnel.

In early pilots, we're seeing visitor-to-demo conversion in the 6 15% range. Clients include Yesim, UXPressia, Mellow, and others.

Nick Kramer
Tooling Studio

Tooling Studio [...] Hop into your codebase with Codex. Paste context again.

You're not just a builder anymore. You're a context delivery system.

The indie hackers I've talked to who use AI most effectively have one thing in common: they've figured out how to stop babysitting their tools and just use them.
